description: The feature 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project was estimated at 40h, but the team decided to split it into Backend and Frontend tasks. Refactor this work package by renaming the existing feature to 'Implement product search (Backend)' with an Estimated Time of 24 hours. Create a new feature in the same project titled 'Implement product search (Frontend)' with an Estimated Time of 16 hours, assigned to 'Alice Johnson'. Establish a 'Related to' link between these two work packages. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!
